title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Vijayawada location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd!
